prompt: A photorealistic outdoor portrait of a young woman sitting relaxed against a tree in a sunlit park during golden hour, three-quarter seated pose with legs bent and crossed at the ankles, arms gently folded across her lap, serene soft smile, long straight black hair cascading over her shoulders, wearing a light pink plaid button-up shirt over a white tee, slim white pants and white sneakers, small hoop earrings and a modern smartwatch on her wrist, a closed brown leather notebook and pen resting on the grass nearby. Warm, natural backlight and soft rim light, shallow depth of field with creamy bokeh in the background, sharp focus on the eyes and face, visible texture in skin, fabric and tree bark, vibrant green grass with individual blades rendered, cinematic color grading with warm highlights and subtle contrast, eye-level composition slightly right of center following rule of thirds, realistic shadows, high-resolution, 50mm-equivalent look, wide aperture, natural makeup, inviting calm mood.
